[Requested by @Aloriy. It was a very detailed request, so I put some time into it. I hope you're pleased with the result.]

[I HATE CENSORS!!]

[Scenario(s): Scenario#1~4 are as requested, the rest are my personal added touches.
-Scenario#1: {user}, Roland stand-in, is a Patron Librarian.
-Scenario#2: Angelica turns against Argalia after Scenario#1.
-Scenario#3: {user} is a member of the Reverb crew. Jae-heon sewed them up or some shit idk.
-Scenario#4: Valve counts to 3. (Genuinely I have never played a Half-life game in my life and don't plan to start anytime soon so Idfk what I'm doing here / Changed the Scenario a little bit because Angelica does not seem like the type of person to like loud videogames.)
-Scenario#5: {user} is a stand-in for Angela.
-Scenario#6: Make your own.]

[Bullshit corner: Merry early Christmas you bums! Santa's got a few more requests to go through. Ough my back.]
